title: SupportIntelligence
intent: Ticket triage, auto-summarization, and root-cause clustering for support orgs
requirements: triage module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
summaries module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
clusters module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
playbooks module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
escalations module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
quality module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
